content: I will update the Dashboard "Nova Vaga" Quick Actions button click handler to open the registration popup modal (`setIsRegisteringVacancy(true)`).

args.Description: "Change Nova Vaga quick action to open vacancy registration modal in CompanyDashboard.tsx"
args.Instruction: "Change onClick in the Nova Vaga quick action button to open vacancy registration modal in CompanyDashboard.tsx"
args.ReplacementContent:
"                  <button 
                    onClick={() => setIsRegisteringVacancy(true)}
                    className="flex items-center gap-2 px-5 py-2.5 bg-gradient-to-r from-primary-600 to-highlight-600 text-white rounded-xl text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest shadow-md shadow-highlight-100/50 hover:shadow-highlight-200/50 hover:shadow-lg transition-all active:scale-95"
                  >
                    <Plus size={14} /> Nova Vaga
                  </button>"
args.TargetContent:
"                  <button 
                    onClick={() => setActiveTab('Cadastrar Vagas')}
                    className="flex items-center gap-2 px-5 py-2.5 bg-gradient-to-r from-primary-600 to-highlight-600 text-white rounded-xl text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest shadow-md shadow-highlight-100/50 hover:shadow-highlight-200/50 hover:shadow-lg transition-all active:scale-95"
                  >
                    <Plus size={14} /> Nova Vaga
                  </button>"
args.toolAction: "Changing quick action button click handler in CompanyDashboard.tsx"
